meta.name: Ezoic Brand Guidelines
meta.purpose: A creation surface, not just documentation: everything an agent or developer needs to produce brand-perfect Ezoic marketing and collateral — the standards as usable tokens and recipes, a complete asset catalog, per-material playbooks, and a pre-ship checklist.
meta.note: Reference payload generated from the v0.1 guide — lift into the canonical Next.js app's /api/ezoic-brand route and the ezoic-brand MCP server. Copyright Ezoic 2026 — experimental draft, not ratified.

usage.goal: Create Ezoic marketing or collateral with perfect brand style, using this API or the ezoic-brand MCP server.
workflow: 1 · Load the standards. API: GET /api/ezoic-brand (this payload) or /api/ezoic-brand/sections/style. MCP: read_brand_guide(section='style') — cache for the session.

2 · Resolve real assets. API: GET /api/ezoic-brand/assets?root=brand|design-elements|photo-backs|fonts. MCP: list_brand_assets(root) then get_brand_asset(publicPath). Never infer what a file shows from its name; never place a file that is not in the catalog (status master or current).
3 · Pick the playbook for the material type (sections.playbooks) and compose with sections.tokens + sections.components. Surfaces are cloud or ink; one wash max; green appears only where it earns it.
4 · Place master files for every logo/wordmark occurrence — the wordmark is never typeset. Use one of the four pairings in sections.variants, with clear space = emblem height.
5 · Verify before shipping: run every item in sections.checklist. Leave metric/quote/customer slots open unless a cited value exists.

api.GET /api/ezoic-brand/assets?root=: Live asset records — path, URL, MIME, bytes, dimensions. Roots: brand, design-elements, photo-backs, fonts, all.
api.GET /api/ezoic-brand/assets/grouped: Counts and records grouped by root.

tools.read_brand_guide: args: section? (one of meta.sectionIndex), format? — full guide or one section. Start here; section='style' for the visual contract, 'tokens' for values, 'playbooks' for material recipes.
tools.search_brand_standards: args: query, limit? — keyword search across palette, type, logo, washes, components, voice.
tools.list_brand_assets: args: root?, query? — the live catalog. Call before placing ANY logo, mark, backdrop, or font.
tools.get_brand_asset: args: publicPath — one asset's metadata plus its direct https://iheartezoic.com URL.

mcp.pattern: read_brand_guide(style) → list_brand_assets(brand) → compose from tokens/components/playbooks → get_brand_asset for each file you place → checklist.

hardRules: The wordmark is never typeset. It is a file, placed.
Only the four logo pairings. Clear space = emblem height on every side.
Five declared colors; surfaces are cloud or ink; white/alpha only as quiet surface tints; no gradients.
Dark mode is eliminated — ink is a local accent, never a theme.
Nothing in all caps. Headings Title Case closed with a period; body sentence case.
Reddit Mono only for code, file paths, hex, exact values.
One wash per surface, neutrals only, under the content, at approved opacity.
No invented metrics, customers, quotes, partners, or capabilities — claim slots stay open until cited.

intro.title: Growth Engineering.
intro.body: Ezoic's identity is light, editorial, and type-led. This guide is the source of truth for how the brand looks. Every mark in it is a master file — place the files as supplied; never re-draw, re-color, or re-type them.
intro.positioning: Revenue infrastructure for the modern web — the operating layer for independent web businesses.

logo.wordmarkRule: The wordmark is never typeset. It is a file, placed.
logo.clearSpace: The emblem height, labelled x, on every side.
logo.minPlacement: Never shrink below legibility; never on busy imagery without an approved veil.

variants.title: Four pairings, then leave it alone.

do: Place the supplied files as-is — the mark is never re-typeset, re-drawn, or approximated.
Keep clear space equal to the emblem height — labelled x — on every side.
Sit the mark on quiet surfaces, at full opacity, in one of the four approved pairings.
dont: Never recolor outside the palette, stretch, rotate, or add shadows.
Never place the mark on busy imagery without an approved veil, or shrink it below legibility.

color.title: Neutrals Build. Green Points.

palette.name: Ezoic Green
palette.role: The single accent — the mark, primary actions, signature moments. It earns every appearance.

palette.name: Steel
palette.role: Muted: quiet pairings, borders, page numbers, secondary text on ink.

color.discipline: Surfaces are cloud or ink. Don't introduce new brand hues for surfaces, charts, or components — neutrals build the page; green makes the point. The previous mint-led dark system is retired. Light, always.
color.darkMode: Eliminated. There is no dark mode or dark theme — this is a decision, not a pending question. Ink surfaces (reversed-logo panels, full-bleed bands, the back cover) are local accents inside the light system, never a global theme. Do not build a .dark variant.
color.tints: White #FFFFFF and alpha/color-mix derivatives of the five declared values are permitted only as quiet surface tints (raised panels, washes) — never as new hues.
color.contrast: Green measures 2.8:1 on light surfaces — never small text on cloud/white. Body text is Charcoal on Cloud (11.5:1) or Cloud on Charcoal; secondary text Graphite on Cloud (5.9:1).
color.accentBudget: In any single composition, green appears in one or two places: the mark, and at most one primary action or one signature proof moment. If green is everywhere, it points at nothing.

type.family: Inter — one family, two optical sizes (Display 28pt for headings, Text 18pt for body), self-hosted.

headings.case: Title Case, closed with a period.

mono.usage: Code, file paths, hex & exact values only. Never decoration, never a heading or label face.

scale.note: Section/sheet headlines. Oversized specimens mirroring the guide's pages may sit tighter than 125%.
EPMV · ezID · JS snippet · #70A92A · file paths · page numbers.

rules: Nothing is set in all caps. Hierarchy comes from scale and spacing — not caps, not bold runs.
The wordmark is never typeset. It is a file, placed.

pixelWash.title: The Pixel Wash — Decisive, Concise, Clear.
pixelWash.rule: The system's one texture. Neutrals only, one wash per surface, always under the content. A wash never carries color, never crowds the mark, and never substitutes for hierarchy.

surfaces.sheetChrome: Running head top-left (13px, weight 600), emblem top-right, hairline footer with section label left and mono page number right.

elements.motion: Quiet entrance motion (opacity + slight vertical rise, ~0.7s, cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1)); minimal hover (color change, line extension, arrow reveal, button state). Nothing bounces, nothing spins.

voice.title: Direct. Confident. Technical.

principles.name: Direct
principles.body: Say what you mean. Cut the fog. If a claim is weak, sharpen it or drop it.

principles.name: Confident
principles.body: State verified things plainly. Confidence is about truth, not volume.

principles.name: Technical
principles.body: Ezoic is revenue infrastructure for the modern web — never a generic vendor, ad network, or plugin.

terminology.note: Never EZOIC or lowercase ezoic outside logo and domain contexts.
Lowercase ez, capital ID — the identity sub-brand.
All caps. Expand to “Earnings Per Thousand Visitors” on first use.
Preferred wording for the lightweight integration.
The period is part of the name.

copyGuardrails: Data-led, not adjective-led — adjectives support numbers, never replace them.
The customer is the subject of most sentences — not the platform.
Category framing: revenue infrastructure / operating layer — never ad network, plugin, or tool.
Avoid hype vocabulary (revolutionary, game-changing, best-in-class, cutting-edge, next-generation, unleash, supercharge, elevate) and any sentence that could appear on any other ad-tech site.
Refocus, never attack — no negative competitor-trashing.

tokens.note: Copy-paste values. The full theme layer (Tailwind v4 + shadcn) ships in the repo at brand-site/design-system/.
tokens.chart: One highlighted series in green; structure and remaining series in charcoal/graphite/steel. Never multiple saturated colors; never a default library palette.

components.primaryAction: Green pill — border-radius 999px, background #70A92A, white text, weight 600–700, letter-spacing -0.03em; hover shifts background to #252726. One per composition.
components.secondaryActionOnInk: Ghost pill — 999px radius, 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12) border, cloud text; hover raises border to ~0.35 alpha.
components.textLink: Ink text with 1px ink underline; hover extends gap or recolors the underline to green. Low chrome.
components.tag: Small pill, hairline border, sentence case, graphite text on a white/near-white tint — the guide's own 'experimental · v0.1' tag is the model.
components.panel: White #FFFFFF raised panel, 16px radius, hairline border rgb(37 39 38 / 0.13). Large bands take 24px radius. Never stock rounded-md SaaS chrome, never heavy drop shadows.
components.inkBand: Local #252726 band, 24px radius when inset; reversed or steel-on-ink lockup only; optional single wash at 8–10% under content.
components.ruledRow: Content rows divided by hairlines (no boxes): label left (11–13px, graphite/steel), content right. The guide's TOC, terminology table, and type scale are the models.
components.sheetChrome: For document-like collateral: running head top-left, emblem top-right (green, ~30px), hairline footer with the document label left and a mono page number right.
components.proofSlot: A green-led signature moment (band or oversized numeral) whose value area STAYS EMPTY until a cited value exists. Label the slot; never fill it with an invented number.
components.clearSpaceDiagram: Lockup inside a dashed green boundary with mono 'x' labels — clear space equals emblem height on every side.
components.emblemInCode: The one safe-to-recreate asset: the standalone emblem as inline SVG using the exact vector path from /brand/emblem-white.svg, recolored only to #70A92A, #252726, #969696, or green-on-ink.

playbooks.note: Structural recipes per material type. All inherit: cloud or ink surfaces, one dominant idea per section, master files for every mark, mono only for exact values, claim slots open until cited, checklist before shipping.

landingPage.structure: Hero (one headline, Title Case with period; optional collage wash at 14%; one green pill) → ruled proof/feature rows → single ink band as the one dark accent → quiet footer with reversed lockup.
landingPage.type: Display 900 for the hero, 600 for row headings, Text 400 body at 150%.
landingPage.accent: Green: the mark, one pill, at most one proof moment.
landingPage.avoid: SaaS card grids, more than one wash, gradients, dashboard screenshots as decoration.

deckSlide.structure: Slide title 5–7 words (Display 700, Title Case, period) → 1–2 sentence core claim → 2–3 numeric proof points in a ruled row → lockup small in a corner (core on cloud / reversed on ink slides).
deckSlide.type: Headline stat as hero typography — Display 900, ink on cloud; green only when the stat is the signature moment.
deckSlide.surfaces: Cloud slides by default; at most one ink accent slide per section of the deck.
deckSlide.avoid: Funnels drawn small-to-big, full-sentence bullets, stock AI-hype graphics, all-caps labels.

socialImage.structure: One idea — oversized Display type on cloud, or one green band + one mark over light-washed photography.
socialImage.logo: One mark only — emblem or lockup, never both fighting; respect clear space at small sizes.
socialImage.avoid: More than one message, more than one green moment, text below legible size.

onePager.structure: Sheet chrome (running head + emblem + mono footer) → headline → ruled rows for the argument → proof slot → one CTA line.
onePager.type: Same scale as the guide's Type In Use page; body 150% for scanability.
onePager.avoid: Two-column density, boxed callouts, decorative mono.

caseStudy.structure: Situation → operating change → proof slot (green-led, cited values only) → quote slot (open until sourced) → next action.
caseStudy.imagery: Light-washed photography under the system, or a quiet editorial surface with an open media slot when no approved image exists.
caseStudy.avoid: Invented metrics/quotes/customer names; heavy cards; dashboard cosplay.

email.structure: Wordmark file small at top (never typeset) → one headline → short body at 150% → one green pill CTA → quiet footer.
email.surfaces: White/cloud only — no ink bands in email; keep washes out of email (client rendering).
email.avoid: Multiple CTAs, image-heavy layouts, all-caps subject-style headers in the body.

adCreative.structure: One green band, one mark, light-washed people photography; or type-only on cloud with the emblem holding the frame.
adCreative.avoid: Gradients, more than one band, competitor references, unsourced claims.

rules: Green-led proof slot for sourced metrics — the value area stays empty until a cited value is available.
Mono only for technical values, file paths, commands, or copy boxes.
No generic SaaS card grids as the default structure.

bannedPatterns: Fake logos, fake lockups, or unapproved logo stand-ins presented as real.
Asset meaning inferred from filenames alone.
Unsourced metrics, proof points, product claims, partner claims, customer names, or quotes.
All-caps label systems, headings, or eyebrows.
Any color outside the five declared values (plus documented white/alpha surface tints) — including the retired mint/lime/frog set.
Dark-led layouts or a global dark theme — ink is a local accent; light, always.
Gradients — no sanctioned brand gradient exists.
More than one wash per surface, a wash over the mark, or a wash above its approved opacity.
Grid-pattern filler, gradient blur blobs, generic SaaS card grids, heavy cards, dashboard-like brand layouts.
Heavy bold everywhere; invented iconography; default chart palettes.
style.conflictNote: Draft asset sheets carry superseded values (ink #222423; line spacing 105%/110%). The guide's written spec — ink #252726; 125%/150% — is the contract.

checklist.title: Pre-ship verification — run every item before any material ships.
items: Color audit: no hex/rgb outside #70A92A, #252726, #575757, #969696, #E3E3E3, plus white/alpha tints of these. No gradients.
Green budget: green appears only as the mark, one primary action, and/or one signature moment — and never as small text on light surfaces.
Caps audit: zero all-caps runs (no text-transform: uppercase; no typed ALL-CAPS headings). Headings are Title Case and close with a period; body is sentence case.
Type spec: headings −5% / 125% Inter Display; body −3% / 150% Inter Text.
Mono audit: Reddit Mono appears only on code, file paths, hex, page numbers, exact values.
Logo audit: every mark/wordmark occurrence is an approved file in one of the four pairings, at full opacity, with clear space ≥ emblem height; nothing recolored, stretched, rotated, or shadowed.
Wash audit: at most one wash per surface, neutrals only, under the content, at approved opacity (14% collage / 8% / 10% ink bands), never over the mark.
Surface audit: cloud or ink only; ink is a local accent, not a theme; dark mode does not exist.
Integrity audit: every metric/quote/customer/partner is cited or its slot is visibly open; no filename-inferred meanings; no retired assets placed.
Terminology audit: Ezoic · ezID · EPMV · JS snippet · Open.Video set exactly; category framing is revenue infrastructure / operating layer.

access.assetStatus: ALIGNED — the live catalog at iheartezoic.com serves the v0.1 system (deployed 2026-07-04) and is the authoritative source; this repo mirrors the masters for offline reference. Always verify against the live catalog before placing.

liveCatalogSnapshot.finding: ALIGNED: the live catalog serves the v0.1 set — /fonts/RedditMono-VF.woff2, the steel pairing masters (/brand/lockup-steel-cloud.png, /brand/lockup-steel-ink.png), and the pixel-wash assets are live. Retired files (mint-era marks, RedHatMono.woff2) remain served only for URL stability.
liveCatalogSnapshot.rule: Prior-system design-elements and photo-backdrops remain PENDING RE-AUDIT for v0.1 — do not place them in new work until each is re-approved against the light edition. RedHatMono.woff2 and the mint-era marks are retired outright.
liveCatalogSnapshot.missingFromAllSources: The guide PDF references export files not present in this repo or the live catalog (e.g. UPDATE/coreLogo.png, UPDATE/Frame 120913.png, and the applied-example collages on the guide's In The Wild page). These ship from the brand owner's v0.1 export pack — catalog them here when supplied.

statusKey.master: A v0.1 master — place as supplied.
statusKey.current: Approved and current — place as supplied where its role fits.
statusKey.draft: Draft/reference material — do not place in shipped work.
statusKey.duplicate: Byte-identical or superseded duplicate of a master — use the master path.

catalog.role: Core lockup — emblem left, wordmark right (light surfaces).
Reversed lockup — ink surfaces only.
Steel-on-cloud pairing (quiet).
Steel-on-ink pairing (quiet reverse).
Emblem vector master — the one safe-to-recreate-in-code asset; recolor only within the palette finishes.
Emblem — green finish.
Emblem — steel finish.
Wordmark file, ink. The wordmark is never typeset.
Wordmark file, light. The wordmark is never typeset.
ezID sub-brand lockup (light surfaces) — only where that product is represented.
ezID sub-brand lockup (ink surfaces) — only where that product is represented.
Alternate compact lockup (ink) — verify fit with get_brand_asset before placing.
Alternate compact lockup (light) — verify fit with get_brand_asset before placing.

Editorial collage — compressed render for hero washes at 14%. NOTE: JPEG data despite the .png extension — serve as image/jpeg or re-encode.
Wash 01 — ink bands at 8%. NOTE: JPEG data despite the .png extension.
Wash 02 — ink bands at 10%. NOTE: JPEG data despite the .png extension.

Alternate light ghost-emblem wash (softer). Large file — compress before web use.
Draft example frame — PENDING RE-AUDIT (treatment defies the v0.1 guide). Do not place or treat as a model until re-approved.
Draft example frame (campaign) — PENDING RE-AUDIT (old-lime band defies the v0.1 guide). Do not place or treat as a model until re-approved.
Emblem glyph cutout (Union series) — check the file's finish before placing; recolor is not permitted.
Emblem glyph cutout (Union series) — check finish before placing.
Emblem glyph cutout (Union series) — check finish before placing.
Emblem glyph cutout (Union series, large — green verified).
Inter Display 900 — display headlines.
Inter Display 700 — titles.
Inter Display 600 — headings.
Inter Text 400 — body.
Inter Text 300 — quiet metadata.
Inter Text 500 — UI emphasis.
Inter Text 600 — strong UI.
Inter Text 700 — emphasis only.
Reddit Mono variable (200–900) — exact values only.
Earlier export of the steel-on-cloud master — use truth-assets/UPDATE/Frame 120889.png.
Byte-identical to the steel-on-ink master — use truth-assets/UPDATE/Frame 120891.png.
Byte-identical to Frame 120891 (steel on ink).
Cloud-emblem + steel-wordmark variant — NOT one of the four approved pairings. Reference only.
Green-emblem + cloud-wordmark variant — NOT one of the four approved pairings. Reference only.

Byte-identical to UPDATE/Frame 120894.png (draft brand sheet).

Mint-era finish — retired with the dark system. Never place; kept only as a catalog mirror until the live catalog is refreshed.
Mint-era finish — retired. Never place.
Lime-era finish — retired. Never place.
Frog-era finish — retired. Never place.

integrity: Use the live asset catalog before placing logos, marks, design elements, photo backdrops, or font files.
Use filenames as locators, not as proof of what an asset depicts or means.
Leave claim slots empty or clearly open when a metric, customer, partner, quote, product fact, or outcome is not available.
Do not invent metrics, customers, outcomes, screenshots, quotes, partners, product capabilities, or asset meanings.
